title: Inflation affects all: Supreme Court says employees and pensioners are entitled to equal DA/DR
description: The Supreme Court on Friday ruled that a State cannot give pensioners a lower increase in Dearness Relief (DR) than the Dearness Allowance (DA) paid to employees. [State of Kerala v. M Vijayakumar & Ors]A Bench of Justices Manoj Misra and Prasanna B Varale said that giving a higher increase to serving employees than to retired persons is arbitrary and violative of Article 14 of the Constitution.The Court explained that both DA for employees and DR for pensioners serve the same purpose and he
